title: cenchrus cafer
intro: Cenchrus cafer, also known as the foxtail grass, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cenchrus cafer include the treatment of fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Cenchrus cafer is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be made into a powder or oil for topical application.
